title: Job Opening Teacher at American Institute

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at American Institute
jsonLd.description:
Join the American Institute family as a Teacher in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About American Institute:
American Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with American Institute!
